title: Técnicas de Biología Molecular Aplicadas a la Taxonomía y Filogenia de Moluscos
author: Lopez-Soriano, Joaquin
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Molecular biology techniques applied to the taxonomy and phylogeny of mollusks. This article briefly describes the basis of the new molecular biology techniques recently applied in the field of taxonomy, with special mention to the PCR (Polymerase Chain Reaction) technique, as well as some practical examples of the use of these techniques in the field of malacology.
steps_raw: Molecular biology techniques applied to the taxonomy and phylogeny of mollusks. This article briefly describes the basis of the new molecular biology techniques recently applied in the field of taxonomy, with special mention to the PCR (Polymerase Chain Reaction) technique, as well as some practical examples of the use of these techniques in the field of malacology.
